summary: Verified draft-product isolation delta on top of iteration_21. Ran full /app/backend/tests suite (21/21 PASS) — includes 5 new draft-isolation tests plus 16 prior security tests. Additionally ran manual curl checks against the real ingress (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) with a synthetic seeded draft + admin session; every guarantee held. Backend-only testing as requested; frontend not touched.

test_matrix_results.anon_list_status_draft: 200 OK, 128 items, drafts=0 (server silently strips filter) ✅
test_matrix_results.admin_list_include_drafts: 200 OK, drafts present (7 drafts in seed data + 1 synthetic) ✅

minor.issue: Uses db.products.distinct('category') across ALL rows including drafts. Currently the draft category ('Chandelier') already appears among published products, so no practical leak. However, if an admin creates a draft in a novel category not yet used by any published product, that category name will leak to the public categories list. Recommend filtering to {'status': {'$ne': 'draft'}} for anon callers here as well.

audited_routes: GET /api/products (list) — HARDENED, forces status!=draft when admin is None
GET /api/products/{id} — HARDENED, returns 404 for anon on drafts
GET /api/products/categories — MINOR (distinct across all statuses, see minor issue above)
GET /api/reviews?product_id=<draft_id> — safe (returns [] identically for drafts and unknown ids, no enumeration signal)

action_items: Optional (LOW): Filter /api/products/categories by status!=draft for anonymous callers so draft-only categories do not surface. Non-blocking for the current requirement (existing draft categories overlap with published).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:378 GET /api/products correctly gates draft visibility on admin=None and also handles the elif chain to only honor include_drafts/status for admins. Good defense-in-depth.
server.py:429 GET /api/products/{product_id} returns 404 (not 403) for anon on drafts — correct choice; prevents existence oracle.
auth.py maybe_admin returning None cleanly (vs raising) is a clean pattern that lets the same handler serve both anon and admin cases.
server.py:1224 _existing_name_index intentionally includes drafts for uniqueness — correct behaviour, admin-only path.
server.py:425 list_categories still runs distinct over ALL products — see minor issue.
test_credentials: Synthetic admin session seeded directly into MongoDB user_sessions collection using ADMIN_EMAILS=raks.agarwal325@gmail.com from /app/backend/.env. All synthetic seed data cleaned up after test.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral synthetic draft product id='draft_f3be5650626c' + admin session token created for manual curl verification, then deleted. Pre-existing seed drafts (7 rows) left untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_22 confirms 100% pass on tests/test_authz_ssrf_ratelimit.py (21 tests). Draft isolation is enforced at both list and single-item read paths. Only minor open item: /api/products/categories does not filter by status — flag only, not required by the current spec. Frontend not tested in this iteration.
